title: CobbleGen Alehouse
description: 9 tiers of highly optimized Cobblestone Generators. From Stone to Nether Star.
body:
# Alehouse CobbleGen 🍺

**The ultimate cobblestone generation solution for Fabric 1.21+.**

Designed with **performance** and **aesthetics** in mind, this mod adds 9 tiers of cobblestone generators. Whether you are playing Skyblock or building a massive factory, Alehouse CobbleGen provides the resources you need without killing your TPS.

## Key Features

*   **Extreme Optimization:** Unlike other mods, this generator calculates drops internally. It pushes items directly into the storage above it. No entities dropped on the ground = **No Lag**.
*   **Smart Buffer System:** If the inventory above is full, the generator stores cobblestone in an internal buffer (4x generation rate).
*   **Crash Protection:** Breaking a generator with a full buffer does **NOT** drop thousands of items. It safely clears the buffer to prevent server crashes and item spam.
*   **3D Models:** Each tier has a unique, custom-made 3D model. No flat textures!
*   **Vanilla-friendly:** Fits perfectly into the vanilla aesthetic while offering powerful automation tools.

##  Tiers & Rates
![tiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09360166841fd09577011e97eeb7884c31956f25.jpeg)
From humble beginnings to god-like production:

1.  **Stone:** 1 block/sec
2.  **Iron:** 4 blocks/sec
3.  **Gold:** 16 blocks/sec
4.  **Lapis:** 64 blocks/sec
5.  **Redstone:** 256 blocks/sec
6.  **Diamond:** 1,024 blocks/sec
7.  **Emerald:** 4,096 blocks/sec
8.  **Obsidian:** 16,384 blocks/sec
9.  **Nether Star:** 65,536 blocks/sec 🤯


##  How to use

1.  **Crafting:**
    *   **Tier 1 (Stone):** Standard recipe (Glass, Lava, Water, Stone).
   ![craft tier 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2fb70a4a28592a0785859063c5e45d59ddeff77.png)
    *   **Upgrades:** Surround the previous tier generator with the material of the next tier.
   ![craft tier2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecab2d329f24039fae42acc8499a1efaabf61854.png)
2.  **Automation:** Place a chest, barrel, or any storage block **directly on top** of the generator. The generator will automatically push cobblestone into it.


*Made with ❤️ by **Alehouse** team.*
